ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the participant (0: Female, 1: Male) */,
  "yob" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the participant */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the participant (e.g., 18-24, 25-34, etc.) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant (e.g., Caucasian, African American, etc.) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant (e.g., High School, Bachelor's, etc.) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the participant (e.g., Employed, Unemployed, etc.) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the participant (e.g., Low, Middle, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the survey */,
  "voting" INTEGER /* Voting behavior of the participant (0: Did not vote, 1: Voted) */,
  "hawthorne" INTEGER /* Response to the Hawthorne question (0: Disagree, 1: Agree) */,
  "civicduty" INTEGER /* Response to the civic duty question (0: Disagree, 1: Agree) */,
  "neighbors" INTEGER /* Response to the neighbors question (0: Disagree, 1: Agree) */,
  "self" INTEGER /* Response to the self question (0: Disagree, 1: Agree) */,
  "control" INTEGER /* Response to the control question (0: Disagree, 1: Agree) */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was completed */,
  "survey_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the survey was completed (e.g., Online, Phone, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_name" TEXT /* Name of the question (e.g., Hawthorne, Civic Duty) */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., Multiple Choice, Scale, etc.) */,
  "response_scale" TEXT /* Scale of the question (e.g., 1-5, Yes/No, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the external data (e.g., public records) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., income, employment status) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the external data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., regression, correlation) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)
